text_original: ok.... so I ended up re visiting this app..... what the actual 🤬 like... y'all making people wait hours and no I'm not talking about one hour... I'm talking about 16 motha🤬ing hours??? what the🤬??? hellll NO!
text_zh: 哦……所以我又重新打开了这个应用……该死的，你们是不是在让人等好几个小时？不，我不是说一个小时，我是说整整16个他妈的小时？？？该死的？见鬼去吧！
reply_original: Hi there, we sincerely apologize for the extreme delay you experienced. Such long wait times are unacceptable, and we're deeply sorry for the frustration. Please share specific details (e.g., feature, error, or action) via support@fantachat.ai so we can investigate immediately. Your feedback is crucial to help us improve.
reply_zh: 你好，我们诚挚地为你们经历的极端延迟表示歉意。如此漫长的等待时间是不可接受的，我们对由此造成的困扰深感抱歉。请通过support@fantachat.ai提供具体细节（例如功能、错误或操作），以便我们立即进行调查。你们的反馈对我们改进至关重要。
